---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "Technical Reviews and Actuarial Analysis"
listing:
  contents:
    - research
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields:
    - image
    - title
    - description
    - date
    - categories
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

## Overview

This section presents reproducible technical work in actuarial modelling,
stochastic processes, insurance analytics, and statistical computing. Each
article focuses on the practical interpretation of a model alongside its
mathematical and computational implementation.
